Add full finance toolkit — 7 tools in one app

- app.py: home page with tool overview
- pages/1: 5-Year Financial Model (moved from root)
- pages/2: Annual Budget (existing)
- pages/3: Lending Calculator (loan + mortgage with early repayment)
- pages/4: Portfolio Analysis (Sharpe, VaR, risk/return scatter)
- pages/5: Stock Comparison (2 stocks, correlation, ratios)
- pages/6: Commodities Dashboard (gold, silver, oil, gas, copper, wheat)

All charts rebuilt in Plotly. Consistent styling across all pages.

Fix pivoting-agent lint: put search_skills/list_skills on same line as "do not"

The lint test checks per-line for search_skills()/list_skills() references
and only exempts lines containing "do not" or "never call". The prohibition
was split across two lines, so the line with the function names didn't match.

Add pivot-aware scanning to network-recon, improve dashboard agent lifecycle

Dashboard (tail-agent.py):
- Auto-discover new agents from tasks directory (no .dashboard file needed)
- Red *stopped* indicator in pane header for dead agents
- Detect agent completion via JSONL final message + 5s mtime debounce
- Detect killed agents (TaskStop) via 30s mtime staleness
- Keep stopped agents visible instead of auto-removing
- Space bar toggles agents in/out from browser overlay

commit.message:
Fix orchestrator: always run host discovery on shell access, including DCs

The orchestrator previously routed DCs exclusively to ad-discovery,
skipping host-level enumeration entirely. This missed additional NICs
(critical for pivoting), Hyper-V infrastructure, scheduled tasks with
stored creds, and local privilege escalation vectors.

Now: host discovery (windows-discovery/linux-discovery) runs on ALL
hosts when shell access is gained. On DCs, ad-discovery runs additionally
after host discovery completes. Sequential, not either/or.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: npm install/build fails silently on Windows due to ErrorActionPreference

Root cause: $ErrorActionPreference = "Stop" causes PowerShell to treat
npm's stderr warnings (deprecation notices, etc.) as terminating errors
when captured with 2>&1. npm exits with code 0 (success) but PowerShell
catches the stderr output as an exception and skips CLI deployment.

Fix: temporarily set $ErrorActionPreference = "Continue" around npm
calls in both install.ps1 and update.ps1, then restore the original
value. Also include exit code and error message in warning output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Switch dashboard & forms to clean white/light theme

Landing page stays dark (conversion-focused). Dashboard, forms,
documents list, and document detail now use a clean light theme:

- Background: #F8F9FB (soft gray) with white cards
- Navbar: white/80 blur with slate borders
- Form cards: white bg, slate-200 borders, shadow-sm
- Inputs: white bg, slate-200 borders, orange focus rings
- Buttons: orange-500 solid or orange-50 outline
- Text: slate-900 headings, slate-500 body, slate-400 helpers
- Status badges: emerald-50/emerald-700 (not neon green on black)

Follows industry best practice: dark marketing, light app.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch Audit Package to direct control-artifact-evidence mapping

Replace broad section-based join (20 artifacts per control) with curated
direct mappings:

Data changes:
- artifacts/inventory.json: add controlSlugs[] to all 60 artifacts
  (1-4 controls each, semantically matched by domain/function/content)
- evidence/index.json: add artifactSlugs[] to all 40 evidence items
  (1-2 artifacts each, matched by what produces the evidence)

App.js changes:
- renderControlDetail() now filters artifacts by controlSlugs[] match
  instead of section-based provision map lookup
- Evidence items filtered by artifact overlap (only show evidence
  relevant to this control's specific artifacts)

Result: consent-collection-mechanism shows 6 artifacts + 3 evidence
items instead of 20 artifacts + 6 evidence items. Distribution across
all 49 controls: median 2 artifacts per control, max 7.

commit.message:
Add context-management skill: prevent AI memory loss and API token errors

Five-layer solution covering tiered context trimming, progressive rolling
summary compression, task-level context isolation, RAG-based long-term
memory, and prompt caching. Includes runnable Python scripts and reference docs.

commit.message:
feat: add audio recovery recorder with realtime-to-batch fallback

Always writes audio chunks to a local recovery file during transcription.
On realtime STT WebSocket disconnect, automatically retries using the
saved audio via ElevenLabs batch API. On app crash, orphaned recovery
files surface in a banner on next launch with Process/Discard actions.

- wavUtils.ts: extract shared buildWavBuffer() helper
- recoveryRecorder.ts: RecoveryRecorder class writing to
  {userData}/transcription-recovery/; sidecar JSON; TTL 7-day cleanup
- session.ts: activeRecovery alongside all non-Swift backends; push()
  in audio-chunk IPC + AudioCapture onChunk callbacks; cleanup after
  successful processTranscript(); handleUnexpectedClose() retries via
  batch when ElevenLabs key + buffered audio available; extract
  postToElevenLabsBatch() for WAV+WebM support; 3 new IPC handlers
- TranscriptionRecoveryBanner.vue: Process/Discard banner in App.vue
- NoteEditor.vue: amber dot + "Retrying…" status during batch retry
- style.css: .main-column wrapper; .retrying dot colour

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: NER header/dedup, summarize stage, triage forwarded emails, model routing

Fixes:
- Remove To/CC participants from NER input — header entities already captured by ExtractHeaderMentions (pf-a97ecd)
- Add name normalization and dedup to NER extraction — canonicalize "Last, First"/"First Last" formats, filter single-char garbage entities (pf-b7f248)
- Fix summarize stage name mismatch (summary→summarize in pipeline_stages) and add Langfuse skip spans for skipped stages (pf-91adad)
- Increase triage truncation from 500→1500 chars, add forwarded email prompt instruction, align contribution default HIGH→MEDIUM (pf-5b28c1)
- Add missing DECISION and ACTION_REQUEST/HIGH routing rules to ai_routing_rules, add DECISION fallback case (pf-8cd06f)

Resolves: pf-a97ecd, pf-b7f248, pf-91adad, pf-5b28c1, pf-8cd06f
